The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $162,994,032Details
International Box Office $148,019,149
Worldwide Box Office $311,013,181
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $13,960,394
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $10,834,486
Total $24,794,880
Further financial details...

Synopsis

SpongeBob SquarePants, the world's favorite sea dwelling invertebrate, comes ashore to our world for his most super-heroic adventure yet.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$55,365,012 (34.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.94 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:52.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$74,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,641 opening theaters/3,680 max. theaters, 7.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $231,246,576

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 6th, 2015 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: January 28th, 2015 (Wide) (Belgium)
January 29th, 2015 (Wide) (Netherlands)
January 30th, 2015 (Wide) (Taiwan)
January 30th, 2015 (Wide) (Mexico)
January 30th, 2015 (Wide) (Iceland)
Video Release: June 2nd, 2015 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for mild action and rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2359, 2/4/2015)
Running Time: 93 minutes
Franchise: SpongeBob SquarePants
Cast, crew, or production detail: Intertitle, Prologue, Voiceover/Narration
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion
Plot point: Exploring a Character’s Mind, Food, Fugitive / On the Run, Pirates, Talking Animals, Time Travel, Tortured for Information, Treasure Hunters, Underwater
Social setting: End of the World, Post Apocalypse
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: United Plankton Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
